TC-S5-005-01.description: Click Validate Case, verify validation report displayed in dialog

TC-S5-005-02.description: Case with all required documents present, verify status='complete' and score=1.0

TC-S5-005-03.description: Case missing passport, verify missingCriticalDocuments includes 'passport'

TC-S5-005-04.description: Document named 'Reisepass.png' matches required 'passport', verify matched correctly

TC-S5-005-05.description: Document named 'Personalausweis.png', verify suggested as alternative to passport

TC-S5-005-06.description: Validation in German document names, verify English expected types matched correctly

TC-S5-005-07.description: Navigate to 'Personal Data' folder, click Validate, verify only folder documents checked

TC-S5-005-08.description: Folder validation, verify report says 'Validating Personal Data folder only'

TC-S5-005-09.description: Ambiguous document name 'Document1.pdf', verify status='needs_clarification' with recommendation

TC-S5-005-10.description: Type /validate-case in chat, verify validation triggered and report shown in chat

TC-S5-005-11.description: Validation report, click 'Add Document' for missing passport, verify upload dialog opens

TC-S5-005-12.description: Case with no documents, verify all required documents listed as missing

TC-S5-005-13.description: Document 'Email.eml' in Emails folder, verify matched to correspondence type

TC-S5-005-14.description: Arabic document name 'جواز سفر' (passport in Arabic), verify matched correctly
